subject: RE: responsibilities.
body:
It will either be late today or tomorrow morning, I expect. Who shall this response be addressed to? 

-----Original Message-----
From: J. Epstein [mailto:jeeproject@yahoo.com] 
Sent: Tuesday, June 03, 2008 7:33 AM
To: Stephanie Thacker
Subject: Re: responsibilities.

when can we expect a first draft.

----- Original Message ----
From: Stephanie Thacker <sdthacker@agmtlaw.com>
To: jeffrey epstein <littlestjeff@yahoo.com>; Jay Lefkowitz <JLefkowitz@kirkland.com>; Ken Starr <Ken.Starr@pepperdine.edu>; Guy Lewis <glewis@lewistein.com>; Martin Weinberg <owlmgw@worldnet.att.net>; avid@att.blackberry.net
Cc: me <jeeproject@yahoo.com>; mike tein <tein@lewistein.com>
Sent: Sunday, June 1, 2008 2:38:52 PM
Subject: RE: responsibilities.

Could someone send me the final version of the letter we sent to CEOS following our March meeting when you get a chance? I want to make sure I have the final version. Thanks. 

-----Original Message-----
From: jeffrey epstein [mailto:littlestjeff@yahoo.com]
Sent: Sunday, June 01, 2008 1:06 PM
To: Jay Lefkowitz; Ken Starr; Stephanie Thacker; Guy Lewis; Martin Weinberg; avid@att.blackberry.net
Cc: me; mike tein
Subject: responsibilities.

for the moment I've delegated the responsibilities as follows.. 
 
Stephanie -   ceos rebuttal , she  can also speak with authority regarding the paragraphs that reference her involvement Marty and Mike- , Questions we would like posed , in a perfect world , to the various players .Alex sloman Marie, drew
Darren,-  coordinating a sloman letter rebuttal. includes a line by line analysis of falsehoods,misrepresentations, and inaccurate facts Jay and team, - structuring an allover presentation..- power point exhibits, transcripts, emails, documents Ken Joe, and Alan, deciding the dag hot buttons,
 question for tomorrows call.. Do we interact with Alex or Sloman in the interim what form.  written only? 
we have to deal with the state deadline. of Jul 8, do we enter a plea with fed consent?if so- to what?
civil cases? new york subpoenas?
